### [AsyncSeq.empty](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#empty)

AsyncSeq.empty 
empty 
 Creates an empty asynchronous sequence that immediately ends.

### [AsyncSeq.singleton](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#singleton)

AsyncSeq.singleton 
singleton 
 Creates an asynchronous sequence that generates a single element and then ends.

### [AsyncSeq.initAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#initAsync)

AsyncSeq.initAsync 
initAsync 
 Generates a finite async sequence using the specified asynchronous initialization function.

### [AsyncSeq.init](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#init)

AsyncSeq.init 
init 
 Generates a finite async sequence using the specified initialization function.

### [AsyncSeq.initInfiniteAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#initInfiniteAsync)

AsyncSeq.initInfiniteAsync 
initInfiniteAsync 
 Generates an infinite async sequence using the specified asynchronous initialization function.

### [AsyncSeq.initInfinite](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#initInfinite)

AsyncSeq.initInfinite 
initInfinite 
 Generates an infinite async sequence using the specified initialization function.

### [AsyncSeq.unfoldAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#unfoldAsync)

AsyncSeq.unfoldAsync 
unfoldAsync 
 Generates an async sequence using the specified asynchronous generator function.

### [AsyncSeq.unfold](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#unfold)

AsyncSeq.unfold 
unfold 
 Generates an async sequence using the specified generator function.

### [AsyncSeq.replicate](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#replicate)

AsyncSeq.replicate 
replicate 
 Creates an async sequence which repeats the specified value the indicated number of times.

### [AsyncSeq.replicateInfinite](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#replicateInfinite)

AsyncSeq.replicateInfinite 
replicateInfinite 
 Creates an infinite async sequence which repeats the specified value.

### [AsyncSeq.replicateInfiniteAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#replicateInfiniteAsync)

AsyncSeq.replicateInfiniteAsync 
replicateInfiniteAsync 
 Creates an infinite async sequence which repeatedly evaluates and emits the specified async value.

### [AsyncSeq.replicateUntilNoneAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#replicateUntilNoneAsync)

AsyncSeq.replicateUntilNoneAsync 
replicateUntilNoneAsync 
 Creates an async sequence given by evaluating the specified async computation until it returns None.

### [AsyncSeq.cycle](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#cycle)

AsyncSeq.cycle 
cycle 
 Returns an async sequence which infinitely cycles through all elements of the source sequence.
 The source is materialised into an array on first enumeration. Returns an empty sequence if
 the source is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.intervalMs](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#intervalMs)

AsyncSeq.intervalMs 
intervalMs 
 Returns an async sequence which emits an element on a specified period.

### [AsyncSeq.append](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#append)

AsyncSeq.append 
append 
 Yields all elements of the first asynchronous sequence and then
 all elements of the second asynchronous sequence.

### [AsyncSeq.appendSeq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#appendSeq)

AsyncSeq.appendSeq 
appendSeq 
 Yields all elements of the source asynchronous sequence and then all elements of the
 synchronous sequence appended at the end.

### [AsyncSeq.prependSeq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#prependSeq)

AsyncSeq.prependSeq 
prependSeq 
 Yields all elements of the synchronous sequence first and then all elements of the
 source asynchronous sequence.

### [AsyncSeq.delay](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#delay)

AsyncSeq.delay 
delay 
 Returns a new async sequence whose enumeration calls the factory function each time
 it is enumerated. Useful for deferring the creation of a sequence until enumeration begins.

### [AsyncSeq.collect](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#collect)

AsyncSeq.collect 
collect 
 Creates an asynchronous sequence that iterates over the given input sequence.
 For every input element, it calls the the specified function and iterates
 over all elements generated by that asynchronous sequence.
 This is the 'bind' operation of the computation expression (exposed using
 the 'for' keyword in asyncSeq computation).

### [AsyncSeq.collectAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#collectAsync)

AsyncSeq.collectAsync 
collectAsync 
 Like AsyncSeq.collect but the mapping function is asynchronous. For every input element
 it calls the specified async function and iterates over all elements of the returned sequence.

### [AsyncSeq.mapAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapAsync)

AsyncSeq.mapAsync 
mapAsync 
 Builds a new asynchronous sequence whose elements are generated by
 applying the specified function to all elements of the input sequence.

 The specified function is asynchronous (and the input sequence will
 be asked for the next element after the processing of an element completes).

### [AsyncSeq.chooseAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#chooseAsync)

AsyncSeq.chooseAsync 
chooseAsync 
 Asynchronously iterates over the input sequence and generates 'x' for
 every input element for which the specified asynchronous function
 returned 'Some(x)'

 The specified function is asynchronous (and the input sequence will
 be asked for the next element after the processing of an element completes).

### [AsyncSeq.filterAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#filterAsync)

AsyncSeq.filterAsync 
filterAsync 
 Builds a new asynchronous sequence whose elements are those from the
 input sequence for which the specified function returned true.

 The specified function is asynchronous (and the input sequence will
 be asked for the next element after the processing of an element completes).

### [AsyncSeq.lastOrDefault](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#lastOrDefault)

AsyncSeq.lastOrDefault 
lastOrDefault 
 Asynchronously returns the last element that was generated by the
 given asynchronous sequence (or the specified default value).

### [AsyncSeq.tryLast](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryLast)

AsyncSeq.tryLast 
tryLast 
 Asynchronously returns the last element that was generated by the
 given asynchronous sequence (or None if the sequence is empty).

### [AsyncSeq.last](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#last)

AsyncSeq.last 
last 
 Asynchronously returns the last element of the asynchronous sequence.
 Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty, mirroring Seq.last.

### [AsyncSeq.item](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#item)

AsyncSeq.item 
item 
 Asynchronously returns the element at the specified index in the asynchronous sequence.
 Raises ArgumentException if the index is out of bounds, mirroring Seq.item.

### [AsyncSeq.tryItem](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryItem)

AsyncSeq.tryItem 
tryItem 
 Asynchronously returns the element at the specified index in the asynchronous sequence,
 or None if the index is out of bounds, mirroring Seq.tryItem.

### [AsyncSeq.firstOrDefault](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#firstOrDefault)

AsyncSeq.firstOrDefault 
firstOrDefault 
 Asynchronously returns the first element that was generated by the
 given asynchronous sequence (or the specified default value).

### [AsyncSeq.tryFirst](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryFirst)

AsyncSeq.tryFirst 
tryFirst 
 Asynchronously returns the first element that was generated by the
 given asynchronous sequence (or None if the sequence is empty).

### [AsyncSeq.head](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#head)

AsyncSeq.head 
head 
 Asynchronously returns the first element of the asynchronous sequence.
 Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.tryHead](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryHead)

AsyncSeq.tryHead 
tryHead 
 Asynchronously returns the first element of the asynchronous sequence as an option,
 or None if the sequence is empty. Mirrors Seq.tryHead.

### [AsyncSeq.isEmpty](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#isEmpty)

AsyncSeq.isEmpty 
isEmpty 
 Asynchronously returns true if the asynchronous sequence contains no elements, false otherwise.
 Short-circuits after the first element. Mirrors Seq.isEmpty.

### [AsyncSeq.exactlyOne](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#exactlyOne)

AsyncSeq.exactlyOne 
exactlyOne 
 Asynchronously returns the only element of the asynchronous sequence.
 Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty or contains more than one element.

### [AsyncSeq.tryExactlyOne](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryExactlyOne)

AsyncSeq.tryExactlyOne 
tryExactlyOne 
 Asynchronously returns the only element of the asynchronous sequence, or None if the
 sequence is empty or contains more than one element.

### [AsyncSeq.scanAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#scanAsync)

AsyncSeq.scanAsync 
scanAsync 
 Aggregates the elements of the input asynchronous sequence using the
 specified 'aggregation' function. The result is an asynchronous
 sequence of intermediate aggregation result.

 The aggregation function is asynchronous (and the input sequence will
 be asked for the next element after the processing of an element completes).

### [AsyncSeq.iterAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#iterAsync)

AsyncSeq.iterAsync 
iterAsync 
 Iterates over the input sequence and calls the specified asynchronous function for
 every value. The input sequence will be asked for the next element after
 the processing of an element completes.

### [AsyncSeq.iteriAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#iteriAsync)

AsyncSeq.iteriAsync 
iteriAsync 
 Iterates over the input sequence and calls the specified asynchronous function for
 every value, passing along the index of that element.
 The input sequence will be asked for the next element after the processing of an element completes.

### [AsyncSeq.iteri](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#iteri)

AsyncSeq.iteri 
iteri 
 Iterates over the input sequence and calls the specified function for
 every value, passing along the index of that element.

### [AsyncSeq.iterAsyncParallel](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#iterAsyncParallel)

AsyncSeq.iterAsyncParallel 
iterAsyncParallel 
 Iterates over the input sequence and calls the specified asynchronous function for
 every value. Each action computation is started but not awaited before consuming
 the next item from the sequence, thereby iterating in parallel.

### [AsyncSeq.iterAsyncParallelThrottled](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#iterAsyncParallelThrottled)

AsyncSeq.iterAsyncParallelThrottled 
iterAsyncParallelThrottled 
 Iterates over the input sequence and calls the specified asynchronous function for
 every value. Each action computation is started but not awaited before consuming
 the next item from the sequence, thereby iterating in parallel with a specified degree of parallelism.

### [AsyncSeq.pairwise](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#pairwise)

AsyncSeq.pairwise 
pairwise 
 Returns an asynchronous sequence that returns pairs containing an element
 from the input sequence and its predecessor. Empty sequence is returned for
 singleton input sequence.

### [AsyncSeq.windowed](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#windowed)

AsyncSeq.windowed 
windowed 
 Returns an asynchronous sequence that yields sliding windows of the given size
 over the source sequence, each yielded as an array. The first window is emitted
 once <c>windowSize</c> elements have been consumed; subsequent windows slide one
 element at a time. The sequence is empty when the source has fewer than
 <c>windowSize</c> elements. Raises <c>System.ArgumentException</c> if
 <c>windowSize</c> is less than 1.

### [AsyncSeq.foldAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#foldAsync)

AsyncSeq.foldAsync 
foldAsync 
 Asynchronously aggregate the elements of the input asynchronous sequence using the
 specified asynchronous 'aggregation' function.

### [AsyncSeq.fold](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#fold)

AsyncSeq.fold 
fold 
 Asynchronously aggregate the elements of the input asynchronous sequence using the
 specified 'aggregation' function.

### [AsyncSeq.reduceAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#reduceAsync)

AsyncSeq.reduceAsync 
reduceAsync 
 Asynchronously reduce the elements of the input asynchronous sequence using the
 specified asynchronous 'reduction' function. Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.reduce](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#reduce)

AsyncSeq.reduce 
reduce 
 Asynchronously reduce the elements of the input asynchronous sequence using the
 specified 'reduction' function. Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.mapFoldAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapFoldAsync)

AsyncSeq.mapFoldAsync 
mapFoldAsync 
 Asynchronously maps each element of the async sequence with an asynchronous folder function that
 also threads an accumulator state through the computation. Returns the array of results and the
 final state, mirroring Seq.mapFold.

### [AsyncSeq.mapFold](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapFold)

AsyncSeq.mapFold 
mapFold 
 Maps each element of the async sequence with a folder function that also threads an accumulator
 state through the computation. Returns the array of results and the final state,
 mirroring Seq.mapFold.

### [AsyncSeq.sum](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sum)

AsyncSeq.sum 
sum 
 Asynchronously sum the elements of the input asynchronous sequence using the specified function.

### [AsyncSeq.minByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#minByAsync)

AsyncSeq.minByAsync 
minByAsync 
 Asynchronously find the element with the minimum projected value. Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.minBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#minBy)

AsyncSeq.minBy 
minBy 
 Asynchronously find the element with the minimum projected value. Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.maxByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#maxByAsync)

AsyncSeq.maxByAsync 
maxByAsync 
 Asynchronously find the element with the maximum projected value. Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.maxBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#maxBy)

AsyncSeq.maxBy 
maxBy 
 Asynchronously find the element with the maximum projected value. Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.min](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#min)

AsyncSeq.min 
min 
 Asynchronously find the minimum element. Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.max](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#max)

AsyncSeq.max 
max 
 Asynchronously find the maximum element. Raises InvalidOperationException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.sumBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sumBy)

AsyncSeq.sumBy 
sumBy 
 Asynchronously sum the mapped elements of an asynchronous sequence using a synchronous projection.

### [AsyncSeq.sumByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sumByAsync)

AsyncSeq.sumByAsync 
sumByAsync 
 Asynchronously sum the mapped elements of an asynchronous sequence using an asynchronous projection.

### [AsyncSeq.average](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#average)

AsyncSeq.average 
average 
 Asynchronously compute the average of the elements of the input asynchronous sequence.
 Raises InvalidArgumentException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.averageBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#averageBy)

AsyncSeq.averageBy 
averageBy 
 Asynchronously compute the average of the mapped elements of an asynchronous sequence using a synchronous projection.
 Raises InvalidArgumentException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.averageByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#averageByAsync)

AsyncSeq.averageByAsync 
averageByAsync 
 Asynchronously compute the average of the mapped elements of an asynchronous sequence using an asynchronous projection.
 Raises InvalidArgumentException if the sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.countByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#countByAsync)

AsyncSeq.countByAsync 
countByAsync 
 Asynchronously count the elements of the input asynchronous sequence grouped by the result of the given asynchronous key projection.
 Returns an array of (key, count) pairs.

### [AsyncSeq.countBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#countBy)

AsyncSeq.countBy 
countBy 
 Asynchronously count the elements of the input asynchronous sequence grouped by the result of the given key projection.
 Returns an array of (key, count) pairs.

### [AsyncSeq.contains](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#contains)

AsyncSeq.contains 
contains 
 Asynchronously determine if the sequence contains the given value

### [AsyncSeq.tryPickAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryPickAsync)

AsyncSeq.tryPickAsync 
tryPickAsync 
 Asynchronously pick a value from a sequence based on the specified chooser function.

### [AsyncSeq.tryPick](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryPick)

AsyncSeq.tryPick 
tryPick 
 Asynchronously pick a value from a sequence based on the specified chooser function.

### [AsyncSeq.pickAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#pickAsync)

AsyncSeq.pickAsync 
pickAsync 
 Asynchronously pick a value from a sequence based on the specified chooser function.
 Raises KeyNotFoundException if the chooser function can't find a matching key.

### [AsyncSeq.pick](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#pick)

AsyncSeq.pick 
pick 
 Asynchronously pick a value from a sequence based on the specified chooser function.
 Raises KeyNotFoundException if the chooser function can't find a matching key.

### [AsyncSeq.tryFind](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryFind)

AsyncSeq.tryFind 
tryFind 
 Asynchronously find the first value in a sequence for which the predicate returns true

### [AsyncSeq.tryFindAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryFindAsync)

AsyncSeq.tryFindAsync 
tryFindAsync 
 Asynchronously find the first value in a sequence for which the async predicate returns true

### [AsyncSeq.find](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#find)

AsyncSeq.find 
find 
 Asynchronously find the first value in a sequence for which the predicate returns true.
 Raises KeyNotFoundException if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.findAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#findAsync)

AsyncSeq.findAsync 
findAsync 
 Asynchronously find the first value in a sequence for which the async predicate returns true.
 Raises KeyNotFoundException if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.tryFindBack](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryFindBack)

AsyncSeq.tryFindBack 
tryFindBack 
 Asynchronously find the last value in a sequence for which the predicate returns true.
 Returns None if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.tryFindBackAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryFindBackAsync)

AsyncSeq.tryFindBackAsync 
tryFindBackAsync 
 Asynchronously find the last value in a sequence for which the async predicate returns true.
 Returns None if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.findBack](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#findBack)

AsyncSeq.findBack 
findBack 
 Asynchronously find the last value in a sequence for which the predicate returns true.
 Raises KeyNotFoundException if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.findBackAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#findBackAsync)

AsyncSeq.findBackAsync 
findBackAsync 
 Asynchronously find the last value in a sequence for which the async predicate returns true.
 Raises KeyNotFoundException if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.tryFindIndex](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryFindIndex)

AsyncSeq.tryFindIndex 
tryFindIndex 
 Asynchronously find the index of the first value in a sequence for which the predicate returns true.
 Returns None if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.tryFindIndexAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryFindIndexAsync)

AsyncSeq.tryFindIndexAsync 
tryFindIndexAsync 
 Asynchronously find the index of the first value in a sequence for which the async predicate returns true.
 Returns None if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.findIndex](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#findIndex)

AsyncSeq.findIndex 
findIndex 
 Asynchronously find the index of the first value in a sequence for which the predicate returns true.
 Raises KeyNotFoundException if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.findIndexAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#findIndexAsync)

AsyncSeq.findIndexAsync 
findIndexAsync 
 Asynchronously find the index of the first value in a sequence for which the async predicate returns true.
 Raises KeyNotFoundException if no matching element is found.

### [AsyncSeq.exists](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#exists)

AsyncSeq.exists 
exists 
 Asynchronously determine if there is a value in the sequence for which the predicate returns true

### [AsyncSeq.existsAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#existsAsync)

AsyncSeq.existsAsync 
existsAsync 
 Asynchronously determine if there is a value in the sequence for which the async predicate returns true

### [AsyncSeq.forall](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#forall)

AsyncSeq.forall 
forall 
 Asynchronously determine if the predicate returns true for all values in the sequence

### [AsyncSeq.forallAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#forallAsync)

AsyncSeq.forallAsync 
forallAsync 
 Asynchronously determine if the async predicate returns true for all values in the sequence

### [AsyncSeq.compareWith](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#compareWith)

AsyncSeq.compareWith 
compareWith 
 Compares two async sequences lexicographically using the given synchronous comparison function.
 Returns a negative integer if source1 < source2, 0 if equal, and a positive integer if source1 > source2.

### [AsyncSeq.compareWithAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#compareWithAsync)

AsyncSeq.compareWithAsync 
compareWithAsync 
 Compares two async sequences lexicographically using the given asynchronous comparison function.
 Returns a negative integer if source1 < source2, 0 if equal, and a positive integer if source1 > source2.

### [AsyncSeq.indexed](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#indexed)

AsyncSeq.indexed 
indexed 
 Return an asynchronous sequence which, when iterated, includes an integer indicating the index of each element in the sequence.

### [AsyncSeq.length](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#length)

AsyncSeq.length 
length 
 Asynchronously determine the number of elements in the sequence

### [AsyncSeq.lengthBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#lengthBy)

AsyncSeq.lengthBy 
lengthBy 
 Asynchronously returns the number of elements in the sequence for which the predicate returns true.

### [AsyncSeq.lengthByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#lengthByAsync)

AsyncSeq.lengthByAsync 
lengthByAsync 
 Asynchronously returns the number of elements in the sequence for which the async predicate returns true.

### [AsyncSeq.scan](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#scan)

AsyncSeq.scan 
scan 
 Same as AsyncSeq.scanAsync, but the specified function is synchronous.

### [AsyncSeq.map](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#map)

AsyncSeq.map 
map 
 Same as AsyncSeq.mapAsync, but the specified function is synchronous.

### [AsyncSeq.iter](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#iter)

AsyncSeq.iter 
iter 
 Iterates over the input sequence and calls the specified function for
 every value.

### [AsyncSeq.choose](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#choose)

AsyncSeq.choose 
choose 
 Asynchronously iterates over the input sequence and generates 'x' for
 every input element for which the specified function
 returned 'Some(x)'

### [AsyncSeq.filter](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#filter)

AsyncSeq.filter 
filter 
 Same as AsyncSeq.filterAsync, but the specified predicate is synchronous
 and processes the input element immediately.

### [AsyncSeq.where](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#where)

AsyncSeq.where 
where 
 Alias for AsyncSeq.filter. Returns elements for which the predicate returns true.
 Mirrors the naming convention in TaskSeq and FSharp.Core.

### [AsyncSeq.whereAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#whereAsync)

AsyncSeq.whereAsync 
whereAsync 
 Alias for AsyncSeq.filterAsync. Returns elements for which the async predicate returns true.

### [AsyncSeq.except](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#except)

AsyncSeq.except 
except 
 Returns a new asynchronous sequence containing only elements that are not present
 in the given excluded collection. Uses a HashSet for O(1) lookup. Mirrors Seq.except.

### [AsyncSeq.removeAt](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#removeAt)

AsyncSeq.removeAt 
removeAt 
 Returns a new asynchronous sequence with the element at the specified index removed.
 Raises ArgumentException if index is negative. Mirrors Seq.removeAt.

### [AsyncSeq.updateAt](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#updateAt)

AsyncSeq.updateAt 
updateAt 
 Returns a new asynchronous sequence with the element at the specified index replaced by the given value.
 Raises ArgumentException if index is negative. Mirrors Seq.updateAt.

### [AsyncSeq.insertAt](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#insertAt)

AsyncSeq.insertAt 
insertAt 
 Returns a new asynchronous sequence with the given value inserted before the element at the specified index.
 An index equal to the length of the sequence appends the value at the end.
 Raises ArgumentException if index is negative or greater than the sequence length. Mirrors Seq.insertAt.

### [AsyncSeq.ofSeq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#ofSeq)

AsyncSeq.ofSeq 
ofSeq 
 Creates an asynchronous sequence that lazily takes element from an
 input synchronous sequence and returns them one-by-one.

### [AsyncSeq.ofList](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#ofList)

AsyncSeq.ofList 
ofList 
 Creates an asynchronous sequence that lazily takes elements from an
 F# list and returns them one-by-one.

### [AsyncSeq.ofArray](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#ofArray)

AsyncSeq.ofArray 
ofArray 
 Creates an asynchronous sequence that lazily takes elements from an
 array and returns them one-by-one.

### [AsyncSeq.ofSeqAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#ofSeqAsync)

AsyncSeq.ofSeqAsync 
ofSeqAsync 
 Creates an asynchronous sequence that lazily takes element from an
 input synchronous sequence of asynchronous computation and returns them one-by-one.

### [AsyncSeq.ofObservableBuffered](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#ofObservableBuffered)

AsyncSeq.ofObservableBuffered 
ofObservableBuffered 
 Converts observable to an asynchronous sequence. Values that are produced
 by the observable while the asynchronous sequence is blocked are stored to
 an unbounded buffer and are returned as next elements of the async sequence.

### [AsyncSeq.ofObservable](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#ofObservable)

AsyncSeq.ofObservable 
ofObservable

### [AsyncSeq.toObservable](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#toObservable)

AsyncSeq.toObservable 
toObservable 
 Converts asynchronous sequence to an IObservable<_>. When the client subscribes
 to the observable, a new copy of asynchronous sequence is started and is
 sequentially iterated over (at the maximal possible speed). Disposing of the
 observer cancels the iteration over asynchronous sequence.

### [AsyncSeq.toBlockingSeq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#toBlockingSeq)

AsyncSeq.toBlockingSeq 
toBlockingSeq 
 Converts asynchronous sequence to a synchronous blocking sequence.
 The elements of the asynchronous sequence are consumed lazily.

### [AsyncSeq.cache](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#cache)

AsyncSeq.cache 
cache 
 Create a new asynchronous sequence that caches all elements of the
 sequence specified as the input. When accessing the resulting sequence
 multiple times, the input will still be evaluated only once

### [AsyncSeq.threadStateAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#threadStateAsync)

AsyncSeq.threadStateAsync 
threadStateAsync 
 Threads a state through the mapping over an async sequence using an async function.

### [AsyncSeq.zipWithAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zipWithAsync)

AsyncSeq.zipWithAsync 
zipWithAsync 
 Combines two asynchronous sequences using the specified function.
 The resulting sequence stops when either of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.zipWithAsyncParallel](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zipWithAsyncParallel)

AsyncSeq.zipWithAsyncParallel 
zipWithAsyncParallel 
 Combines two asynchronous sequences using the specified function.
 The values from sequences are retrieved in parallel.
 The resulting sequence stops when either of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.zip](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zip)

AsyncSeq.zip 
zip 
 Combines two asynchronous sequences into a sequence of pairs.
 The resulting sequence stops when either of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.zipParallel](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zipParallel)

AsyncSeq.zipParallel 
zipParallel 
 Combines two asynchronous sequences into a sequence of pairs.
 The values from sequences are retrieved in parallel.
 The resulting sequence stops when either of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.zipWith](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zipWith)

AsyncSeq.zipWith 
zipWith 
 Combines two asynchronous sequences using the specified function.
 The resulting sequence stops when either of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.zipWithParallel](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zipWithParallel)

AsyncSeq.zipWithParallel 
zipWithParallel 
 Combines two asynchronous sequences using the specified function.
 The values from sequences are retrieved in parallel.
 The resulting sequence stops when either of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.zipWithAsync3](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zipWithAsync3)

AsyncSeq.zipWithAsync3 
zipWithAsync3 
 Combines three asynchronous sequences using the specified asynchronous function.
 The resulting sequence stops when any of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.zip3](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zip3)

AsyncSeq.zip3 
zip3 
 Combines three asynchronous sequences into a sequence of triples.
 The resulting sequence stops when any of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.zipWith3](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zipWith3)

AsyncSeq.zipWith3 
zipWith3 
 Combines three asynchronous sequences using the specified function.
 The resulting sequence stops when any of the argument sequences stop.

### [AsyncSeq.allPairs](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#allPairs)

AsyncSeq.allPairs 
allPairs 
 Returns an async sequence of all pairs of elements from the two input sequences.
 The second sequence is fully buffered before iteration begins, mirroring Seq.allPairs.

### [AsyncSeq.mapiAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapiAsync)

AsyncSeq.mapiAsync 
mapiAsync 
 Builds a new asynchronous sequence whose elements are generated by
 applying the specified function to all elements of the input sequence.

 The specified function is asynchronous (and the input sequence will
 be asked for the next element after the processing of an element completes).

### [AsyncSeq.mapi](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapi)

AsyncSeq.mapi 
mapi 
 Builds a new asynchronous sequence whose elements are generated by
 applying the specified function to all elements of the input sequence.

 The specified function is synchronous (and the input sequence will
 be asked for the next element after the processing of an element completes).

### [AsyncSeq.zipWithIndexAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zipWithIndexAsync)

AsyncSeq.zipWithIndexAsync 
zipWithIndexAsync

### [AsyncSeq.zappAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zappAsync)

AsyncSeq.zappAsync 
zappAsync 
 Feeds an async sequence of values into an async sequence of async functions.

### [AsyncSeq.zapp](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#zapp)

AsyncSeq.zapp 
zapp 
 Feeds an async sequence of values into an async sequence of functions.

### [AsyncSeq.combineLatestWithAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#combineLatestWithAsync)

AsyncSeq.combineLatestWithAsync 
combineLatestWithAsync 
 Merges two async sequences using the specified combine function. The resulting async sequence produces an element when either
 input sequence produces an element, passing the new element from the emitting sequence and the previously emitted element from the other sequence.
 If either of the input sequences is empty, the resulting sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.combineLatestWith](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#combineLatestWith)

AsyncSeq.combineLatestWith 
combineLatestWith 
 Merges two async sequences using the specified combine function. The resulting async sequence produces an element when either
 input sequence produces an element, passing the new element from the emitting sequence and the previously emitted element from the other sequence.
 If either of the input sequences is empty, the resulting sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.combineLatest](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#combineLatest)

AsyncSeq.combineLatest 
combineLatest 
 Merges two async sequences. The resulting async sequence produces an element when either
 input sequence produces an element, passing the new element from the emitting sequence and the previously emitted element from the other sequence.
 If either of the input sequences is empty, the resulting sequence is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.traverseOptionAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#traverseOptionAsync)

AsyncSeq.traverseOptionAsync 
traverseOptionAsync 
 Traverses an async sequence an applies to specified function such that if None is returned the traversal short-circuits
 and None is returned as the result. Otherwise, the entire sequence is traversed and the result returned as Some.

### [AsyncSeq.traverseChoiceAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#traverseChoiceAsync)

AsyncSeq.traverseChoiceAsync 
traverseChoiceAsync 
 Traverses an async sequence an applies to specified function such that if Choice2Of2 is returned the traversal short-circuits
 and Choice2Of2 is returned as the result. Otherwise, the entire sequence is traversed and the result returned as Choice1Of2.

### [AsyncSeq.takeWhileAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#takeWhileAsync)

AsyncSeq.takeWhileAsync 
takeWhileAsync 
 Returns elements from an asynchronous sequence while the specified
 predicate holds. The predicate is evaluated asynchronously.

### [AsyncSeq.takeUntilSignal](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#takeUntilSignal)

AsyncSeq.takeUntilSignal 
takeUntilSignal 
 Returns elements from the argument async sequence until the specified signal completes or
 the sequences completes.

### [AsyncSeq.takeUntil](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#takeUntil)

AsyncSeq.takeUntil 
takeUntil

### [AsyncSeq.skipWhileAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#skipWhileAsync)

AsyncSeq.skipWhileAsync 
skipWhileAsync 
 Skips elements from an asynchronous sequence while the specified
 predicate holds and then returns the rest of the sequence. The
 predicate is evaluated asynchronously.

### [AsyncSeq.skipUntilSignal](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#skipUntilSignal)

AsyncSeq.skipUntilSignal 
skipUntilSignal 
 Skips elements from an async sequence until the specified signal completes.

### [AsyncSeq.skipUntil](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#skipUntil)

AsyncSeq.skipUntil 
skipUntil

### [AsyncSeq.takeWhile](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#takeWhile)

AsyncSeq.takeWhile 
takeWhile 
 Returns elements from an asynchronous sequence while the specified
 predicate holds. The predicate is evaluated synchronously.

### [AsyncSeq.takeWhileInclusive](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#takeWhileInclusive)

AsyncSeq.takeWhileInclusive 
takeWhileInclusive 
 Returns elements from an asynchronous sequence while the specified
 predicate holds. The predicate is evaluated synchronously.
 Does return the first element that predicate fails

### [AsyncSeq.takeWhileInclusiveAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#takeWhileInclusiveAsync)

AsyncSeq.takeWhileInclusiveAsync 
takeWhileInclusiveAsync 
 Returns elements from an asynchronous sequence while the specified async predicate holds,
 and also returns the first element for which the predicate returns false (inclusive).

### [AsyncSeq.skipWhile](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#skipWhile)

AsyncSeq.skipWhile 
skipWhile 
 Skips elements from an asynchronous sequence while the specified
 predicate holds and then returns the rest of the sequence. The
 predicate is evaluated asynchronously.

### [AsyncSeq.skipWhileInclusive](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#skipWhileInclusive)

AsyncSeq.skipWhileInclusive 
skipWhileInclusive 
 Skips elements from an asynchronous sequence while the predicate holds AND also skips the
 first element for which the predicate returns false (the boundary element), then returns the rest.

### [AsyncSeq.skipWhileInclusiveAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#skipWhileInclusiveAsync)

AsyncSeq.skipWhileInclusiveAsync 
skipWhileInclusiveAsync 
 Skips elements from an asynchronous sequence while the async predicate holds AND also skips the
 first element for which the predicate returns false (the boundary element), then returns the rest.

### [AsyncSeq.take](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#take)

AsyncSeq.take 
take 
 Returns the first N elements of an asynchronous sequence
 does not cast an exception if count is larger than the sequence length.

### [AsyncSeq.truncate](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#truncate)

AsyncSeq.truncate 
truncate 
 Alias for take

### [AsyncSeq.skip](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#skip)

AsyncSeq.skip 
skip 
 Skips the first N elements of an asynchronous sequence and
 then returns the rest of the sequence unmodified.

### [AsyncSeq.tail](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tail)

AsyncSeq.tail 
tail 
 Returns an asynchronous sequence that skips the first element of the input sequence.
 Returns an empty sequence if the source is empty.

### [AsyncSeq.tryTail](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#tryTail)

AsyncSeq.tryTail 
tryTail 
 Returns None if the source sequence is empty; otherwise returns Some of an async sequence
 containing all elements except the first. The source is enumerated once.

### [AsyncSeq.splitAt](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#splitAt)

AsyncSeq.splitAt 
splitAt 
 Splits an async sequence at the given index. Returns an async computation that yields
 the first `count` elements as an array and the remaining elements as a new AsyncSeq.
 The source is enumerated once; the returned AsyncSeq lazily produces the remainder.

### [AsyncSeq.toArrayAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#toArrayAsync)

AsyncSeq.toArrayAsync 
toArrayAsync 
 Creates an async computation which iterates the AsyncSeq and collects the output into an array.

### [AsyncSeq.toListAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#toListAsync)

AsyncSeq.toListAsync 
toListAsync 
 Creates an async computation which iterates the AsyncSeq and collects the output into a list.

### [AsyncSeq.toListSynchronously](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#toListSynchronously)

AsyncSeq.toListSynchronously 
toListSynchronously 
 Synchronously iterates the AsyncSeq and collects the output into a list.

### [AsyncSeq.toArraySynchronously](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#toArraySynchronously)

AsyncSeq.toArraySynchronously 
toArraySynchronously 
 Synchronously iterates the AsyncSeq and collects the output into an array.

### [AsyncSeq.partition](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#partition)

AsyncSeq.partition 
partition 
 Splits the sequence into two arrays: the first contains elements for which the predicate
 returns true, the second contains elements for which it returns false. Mirrors Seq.partition.

### [AsyncSeq.partitionAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#partitionAsync)

AsyncSeq.partitionAsync 
partitionAsync 
 Splits the sequence into two arrays using an async predicate: the first contains elements
 for which the predicate returns true, the second contains elements for which it returns false.

### [AsyncSeq.concatSeq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#concatSeq)

AsyncSeq.concatSeq 
concatSeq 
 Flattens an AsyncSeq of synchronous sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.concat](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#concat)

AsyncSeq.concat 
concat 
 Flattens an AsyncSeq of asynchronous sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.sort](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sort)

AsyncSeq.sort 
sort 
 Yields a sequence ordered by keys.
 This function returns a sequence that digests the whole initial sequence as soon as
 that sequence is iterated. As a result this function should not be used with
 large or infinite sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.sortBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortBy)

AsyncSeq.sortBy 
sortBy 
 Applies a key-generating function to each element of an AsyncSeq and yield an array ordered by keys.
 This function returns an array that digests the whole initial sequence as soon as
 that sequence is iterated. As a result this function should not be used with
 large or infinite sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.sortDescending](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortDescending)

AsyncSeq.sortDescending 
sortDescending 
 Yields an array ordered descending by keys.
 This function returns an array that digests the whole initial sequence as soon as
 that sequence is iterated. As a result this function should not be used with
 large or infinite sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.sortByDescending](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortByDescending)

AsyncSeq.sortByDescending 
sortByDescending 
 Applies a key-generating function to each element of an AsyncSeq and yield an array ordered descending by keys.
 This function returns an array that digests the whole initial sequence as soon as
 that sequence is iterated. As a result this function should not be used with
 large or infinite sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.sortWith](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortWith)

AsyncSeq.sortWith 
sortWith 
 Sorts the given async sequence using the given comparison function and returns an array.
 This function returns an array that digests the whole initial sequence as soon as
 that sequence is iterated. As a result this function should not be used with
 large or infinite sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.sortAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortAsync)

AsyncSeq.sortAsync 
sortAsync 
 Asynchronously sorts the given async sequence and returns an Async<array<'T>>.
 Prefer this over sortAsync when composing async workflows.

### [AsyncSeq.sortByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortByAsync)

AsyncSeq.sortByAsync 
sortByAsync 
 Asynchronously applies a key-generating function to each element of an AsyncSeq and returns
 an Async<array<'T>> ordered by keys. Prefer this over sortBy when composing async workflows.

### [AsyncSeq.sortDescendingAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortDescendingAsync)

AsyncSeq.sortDescendingAsync 
sortDescendingAsync 
 Asynchronously sorts the given async sequence in descending order and returns an Async<array<'T>>.
 Prefer this over sortDescending when composing async workflows.

### [AsyncSeq.sortByDescendingAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortByDescendingAsync)

AsyncSeq.sortByDescendingAsync 
sortByDescendingAsync 
 Asynchronously applies a key-generating function to each element of an AsyncSeq and returns
 an Async<array<'T>> ordered descending by keys. Prefer this over sortByDescending when composing async workflows.

### [AsyncSeq.sortWithAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#sortWithAsync)

AsyncSeq.sortWithAsync 
sortWithAsync 
 Asynchronously sorts the given async sequence using the given comparison function and returns
 an Async<array<'T>>. Prefer this over sortWith when composing async workflows.

### [AsyncSeq.rev](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#rev)

AsyncSeq.rev 
rev 
 Returns a new async sequence with the elements in reverse order. The entire source
 sequence is buffered before yielding any elements, mirroring Seq.rev.
 This function should not be used with large or infinite sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.interleave](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#interleave)

AsyncSeq.interleave 
interleave 
 Interleaves two async sequences of the same type into a resulting sequence. The provided
 sequences are consumed in lock-step.

### [AsyncSeq.interleaveMany](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#interleaveMany)

AsyncSeq.interleaveMany 
interleaveMany 
 Interleaves a sequence of async sequences into a resulting async sequence. The provided
 sequences are consumed in lock-step.

### [AsyncSeq.interleaveChoice](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#interleaveChoice)

AsyncSeq.interleaveChoice 
interleaveChoice 
 Interleaves two async sequences into a resulting sequence. The provided
 sequences are consumed in lock-step.

### [AsyncSeq.chunkBySize](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#chunkBySize)

AsyncSeq.chunkBySize 
chunkBySize 
 Buffer items from the async sequence into buffers of a specified size.
 The last buffer returned may be less than the specified buffer size.

### [AsyncSeq.bufferByCount](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#bufferByCount)

AsyncSeq.bufferByCount 
bufferByCount 
 Buffer items from the async sequence into buffers of a specified size.
 The last buffer returned may be less than the specified buffer size.

### [AsyncSeq.chunkByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#chunkByAsync)

AsyncSeq.chunkByAsync 
chunkByAsync 
 Groups consecutive elements of the async sequence that share the same key (as computed by an async projection)
 and yields each group as a pair of the key and a list of elements.

### [AsyncSeq.chunkBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#chunkBy)

AsyncSeq.chunkBy 
chunkBy 
 Groups consecutive elements of the async sequence that share the same key (as computed by a projection)
 and yields each group as a pair of the key and a list of elements.

### [AsyncSeq.bufferByCountAndTime](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#bufferByCountAndTime)

AsyncSeq.bufferByCountAndTime 
bufferByCountAndTime 
 Buffer items from the async sequence until a specified buffer size is reached or a specified amount of time is elapsed.

### [AsyncSeq.bufferByTime](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#bufferByTime)

AsyncSeq.bufferByTime 
bufferByTime 
 Buffers items from the async sequence by the specified time interval.
 If no items are received in an intervel and empty array is emitted.

### [AsyncSeq.mergeChoice](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mergeChoice)

AsyncSeq.mergeChoice 
mergeChoice 
 Merges two async sequences into an async sequence non-deterministically.
 The resulting async sequence produces elements when any argument sequence produces an element.

### [AsyncSeq.merge](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#merge)

AsyncSeq.merge 
merge 
 Merges two async sequences of the same type into an async sequence non-deterministically.
 The resulting async sequence produces elements when any argument sequence produces an element.

### [AsyncSeq.mergeAll](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mergeAll)

AsyncSeq.mergeAll 
mergeAll 
 Merges all specified async sequences into an async sequence non-deterministically.
 The resulting async sequence produces elements when any argument sequence produces an element.

### [AsyncSeq.distinctUntilChangedWithAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#distinctUntilChangedWithAsync)

AsyncSeq.distinctUntilChangedWithAsync 
distinctUntilChangedWithAsync 
 Returns an async sequence which contains no contiguous duplicate elements based on the specified comparison function.

### [AsyncSeq.distinctUntilChangedWith](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#distinctUntilChangedWith)

AsyncSeq.distinctUntilChangedWith 
distinctUntilChangedWith 
 Returns an async sequence which contains no contiguous duplicate elements based on the specified comparison function.

### [AsyncSeq.distinctUntilChanged](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#distinctUntilChanged)

AsyncSeq.distinctUntilChanged 
distinctUntilChanged 
 Returns an async sequence which contains no contiguous duplicate elements.

### [AsyncSeq.distinctByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#distinctByAsync)

AsyncSeq.distinctByAsync 
distinctByAsync 
 Returns an async sequence containing only distinct elements, determined by the given asynchronous key projection.
 Elements are compared using structural equality on the projected key.

### [AsyncSeq.distinctBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#distinctBy)

AsyncSeq.distinctBy 
distinctBy 
 Returns an async sequence containing only distinct elements, determined by the given key projection.
 Elements are compared using structural equality on the projected key.

### [AsyncSeq.distinct](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#distinct)

AsyncSeq.distinct 
distinct 
 Returns an async sequence containing only distinct elements.
 Elements are compared using structural equality.

### [AsyncSeq.getIterator](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#getIterator)

AsyncSeq.getIterator 
getIterator

### [AsyncSeq.mapAsyncParallel](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapAsyncParallel)

AsyncSeq.mapAsyncParallel 
mapAsyncParallel 
 Builds a new asynchronous sequence whose elements are generated by
 applying the specified function to all elements of the input sequence.

 The function is applied to elements in order and results are emitted in order,
 but in parallel, without waiting for a prior mapping operation to complete.
 Parallelism is bound by the ThreadPool.

### [AsyncSeq.mapAsyncUnorderedParallel](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapAsyncUnorderedParallel)

AsyncSeq.mapAsyncUnorderedParallel 
mapAsyncUnorderedParallel 
 Builds a new asynchronous sequence whose elements are generated by
 applying the specified function to all elements of the input sequence.

 The function is applied to elements in parallel, and results are emitted
 in the order they complete (unordered), without preserving the original order.
 This can provide better performance than mapAsyncParallel when order doesn't matter.
 Parallelism is bound by the ThreadPool.

### [AsyncSeq.mapAsyncUnorderedParallelThrottled](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapAsyncUnorderedParallelThrottled)

AsyncSeq.mapAsyncUnorderedParallelThrottled 
mapAsyncUnorderedParallelThrottled 
 Builds a new asynchronous sequence whose elements are generated by
 applying the specified function to all elements of the input sequence,
 with at most <c>parallelism</c> mapping operations running concurrently.

 The function is applied to elements in parallel (throttled), and results are emitted
 in the order they complete (unordered), without preserving the original order.

### [AsyncSeq.mapAsyncParallelThrottled](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#mapAsyncParallelThrottled)

AsyncSeq.mapAsyncParallelThrottled 
mapAsyncParallelThrottled 
 Builds a new asynchronous sequence whose elements are generated by
 applying the specified function to all elements of the input sequence,
 with at most <c>parallelism</c> mapping operations running concurrently.

 The function is applied to elements in order and results are emitted in order,
 but in parallel, with at most <c>parallelism</c> operations running concurrently.
 This is the throttled counterpart to <c>mapAsyncParallel</c>.

### [AsyncSeq.groupByAsync](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#groupByAsync)

AsyncSeq.groupByAsync 
groupByAsync 
 Applies a key-generating function to each element and returns an async sequence containing unique keys
 and async sequences containing elements corresponding to the key.

 Note that the resulting async sequence has to be processed in parallel (e.g AsyncSeq.mapAsyncParallel) becaused
 completion of sub-sequences depends on completion of other sub-sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.groupBy](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#groupBy)

AsyncSeq.groupBy 
groupBy 
 Applies a key-generating function to each element and returns an async sequence containing unique keys
 and async sequences containing elements corresponding to the key.

 Note that the resulting async sequence has to be processed in parallel (e.g AsyncSeq.mapAsyncParallel) becaused
 completion of sub-sequences depends on completion of other sub-sequences.

### [AsyncSeq.ofAsyncEnum](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#ofAsyncEnum)

AsyncSeq.ofAsyncEnum 
ofAsyncEnum 
 Returns the input AsyncSeq as a BCL IAsyncEnumerable<'T>. Identity since AsyncSeq<'T> IS IAsyncEnumerable<'T> in v4.

### [AsyncSeq.toAsyncEnum](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#toAsyncEnum)

AsyncSeq.toAsyncEnum 
toAsyncEnum 
 Returns the input AsyncSeq as a BCL IAsyncEnumerable<'T>. Identity since AsyncSeq<'T> IS IAsyncEnumerable<'T> in v4.

### [AsyncSeq.ofIQueryable](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#ofIQueryable)

AsyncSeq.ofIQueryable 
ofIQueryable

### [AsyncSeq.toChannel](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#toChannel)

AsyncSeq.toChannel 
toChannel 
 Fills a channel writer with the values from an async seq.
 The writer will be closed when the async seq completes or raises an error.

### [AsyncSeq.fromChannel](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#fromChannel)

AsyncSeq.fromChannel 
fromChannel 
 Creates an async seq from a channel reader.
 The async seq will read values from the channel reader until it is closed.
 If the reader raises an error than the sequence will raise it.

### [AsyncSeq.prefetch](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#prefetch)

AsyncSeq.prefetch 
prefetch 
 Transforms an async seq to a new one that fetches values ahead of time to improve throughput.

### [AsyncSeq.withCancellation](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq.html#withCancellation)

AsyncSeq.withCancellation 
withCancellation 

 Returns a new <code>AsyncSeq</code> that passes the given <code>CancellationToken</code> to
 <code>GetAsyncEnumerator</code>, overriding whatever token would otherwise be used when iterating.
 This is useful when consuming sequences from libraries such as Entity Framework that
 accept a <code>CancellationToken</code> through <code>GetAsyncEnumerator</code>.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html)

AsyncSeqBuilder 
 Computation builder that allows creating of asynchronous
 sequences using the 'asyncSeq { ... }' syntax 
AsyncSeqBuilder.``.ctor`` 
``.ctor`` 
AsyncSeqBuilder.Bind 
Bind 
AsyncSeqBuilder.Combine 
Combine 
AsyncSeqBuilder.Delay 
Delay 
AsyncSeqBuilder.For 
For 
AsyncSeqBuilder.For 
For 
AsyncSeqBuilder.TryFinally 
TryFinally 
AsyncSeqBuilder.TryWith 
TryWith 
AsyncSeqBuilder.Using 
Using 
AsyncSeqBuilder.While 
While 
AsyncSeqBuilder.Yield 
Yield 
AsyncSeqBuilder.YieldFrom 
YieldFrom 
AsyncSeqBuilder.YieldFrom 
YieldFrom 
AsyncSeqBuilder.Zero 
Zero

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.``.ctor``](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#``.ctor``)

AsyncSeqBuilder.``.ctor`` 
``.ctor`` 
 Internal use only

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.Bind](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#Bind)

AsyncSeqBuilder.Bind 
Bind 
 Implements binding for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.Combine](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#Combine)

AsyncSeqBuilder.Combine 
Combine 
 Implements sequential composition for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.Delay](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#Delay)

AsyncSeqBuilder.Delay 
Delay 
 Implements delay for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.For](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#For)

AsyncSeqBuilder.For 
For 
 Implements "for" loops for the asyncSeq computation builder.

 Asynchronous for loop - for all elements from the input sequence,
 generate all elements produced by the body (asynchronously). See
 also the AsyncSeq.collect function.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.For](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#For)

AsyncSeqBuilder.For 
For 
 For loop that iterates over a synchronous sequence (and generates
 all elements generated by the asynchronous body)

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.TryFinally](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#TryFinally)

AsyncSeqBuilder.TryFinally 
TryFinally 
 Implements "try-finally" for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.TryWith](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#TryWith)

AsyncSeqBuilder.TryWith 
TryWith 
 Implements "try-with" for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.Using](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#Using)

AsyncSeqBuilder.Using 
Using 
 Implements "use" for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.While](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#While)

AsyncSeqBuilder.While 
While 
 Implements "while" for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.Yield](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#Yield)

AsyncSeqBuilder.Yield 
Yield 
 Implements "yield" for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.YieldFrom](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#YieldFrom)

AsyncSeqBuilder.YieldFrom 
YieldFrom 
 Implements "yield!" for a synchronous sequence in the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.YieldFrom](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#YieldFrom)

AsyncSeqBuilder.YieldFrom 
YieldFrom 
 Implements "yield!" for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqBuilder.Zero](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-asyncseqbuilder.html#Zero)

AsyncSeqBuilder.Zero 
Zero 
 Implements empty for the asyncSeq computation builder.

### [AsyncSeqExtensions](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqextensions.html)

AsyncSeqExtensions 
 An automatically-opened module that contains the `asyncSeq` builder and an extension method 
AsyncSeqExtensions.asyncSeq 
asyncSeq 
AsyncSeqExtensions.For 
For

### [AsyncSeqExtensions.asyncSeq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqextensions.html#asyncSeq)

AsyncSeqExtensions.asyncSeq 
asyncSeq 
 Builds an asynchronous sequence using the computation builder syntax

### [AsyncSeqExtensions.For](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqextensions.html#For)

AsyncSeqExtensions.For 
For

### [AsyncSeqSrc](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqsrc.html)

AsyncSeqSrc 
 Operations on async sequence sources. 
AsyncSeqSrc.create 
create 
AsyncSeqSrc.put 
put 
AsyncSeqSrc.close 
close 
AsyncSeqSrc.error 
error 
AsyncSeqSrc.toAsyncSeq 
toAsyncSeq

### [AsyncSeqSrc.create](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqsrc.html#create)

AsyncSeqSrc.create 
create 
 Creates a new async sequence source.

### [AsyncSeqSrc.put](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqsrc.html#put)

AsyncSeqSrc.put 
put 
 Causes any async sequences created before the call to yield the item.

### [AsyncSeqSrc.close](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqsrc.html#close)

AsyncSeqSrc.close 
close 
 Closes the async sequence source casuing any created async sequences to complete.

### [AsyncSeqSrc.error](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqsrc.html#error)

AsyncSeqSrc.error 
error 
 Causes async sequence created before the call to raise an exception.

### [AsyncSeqSrc.toAsyncSeq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqsrc.html#toAsyncSeq)

AsyncSeqSrc.toAsyncSeq 
toAsyncSeq 
 Creates an async sequence which yields values as they are put into the source and terminates
 when the source is closed. This sequence will yield items starting with the next put.
 Many async sequences can be created from once source.

### [Seq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-seq.html)

Seq 
 
Seq.ofAsyncSeq 
ofAsyncSeq

### [Seq.ofAsyncSeq](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-seq.html#ofAsyncSeq)

Seq.ofAsyncSeq 
ofAsyncSeq 
 Converts asynchronous sequence to a synchronous blocking sequence.
 The elements of the asynchronous sequence are consumed lazily.

### [AsyncSeq<'T>](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseq-1.html)

AsyncSeq<'T> 
 An asynchronous sequence; equivalent to System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable<'T>.
 Use the asyncSeq { ... } computation expression to create values, and the AsyncSeq module
 for combinators.

### [AsyncSeqSrc<'T>](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Control.AsyncSeq/reference/fsharp-control-asyncseqsrc-1.html)

AsyncSeqSrc<'T> 
 An async sequence source produces async sequences.
